entries.text: Spent the last couple days building out the personal site's /log feature — a bi-daily, auto-generated public record of what I'm actually working on, gathered, summarized, and sanitized before it ever hits the page. Also rebuilt the writing tab to pull in my own posts and music listening, which meant wrestling with unreliable third-party feeds: settled on caching every fetched post into a small database so the page survives when the upstream sources go down. Fixed a keyboard-nav bug that was swallowing browser shortcuts along the way.
Genesis given persistent memory across sessions and its own terminal goals. Ongoing.
Boréal Numérique paused — outreach ran its course, one discovery call booked. Case-study gap still open.
